name: the runner degrades an optional absent tool to not_enforced, never a vacuous green
command: printf 'x\n' > f.md && RUN_TOOL_FORCE_ABSENT=1 bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/run-tool.sh" --tool checkov --file f.md 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 3 ] && grep -q 'status=not_enforced' e.txt && echo not-enforced-3 1>&2
